---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
What do you want added?

## Why it matters
Why is this useful?

## Real behavior
Describe how this should actually work (not just UI).

## Safety / trust level
If this touches actions, files, voice, screen capture, or automation, explain whether it is safe, private, sensitive, or critical.

## Area
- api
- brain
- providers
- auth
- documents
- memory
- security
- voice
- web_v2
- agents
- desktop/browser control
- OS automation
- screen awareness
- tests
- docs
- other
